steps: Suspend RNA pellet in 2 µL, TE Buffer TE Buffer Thermo Fisher Catalog #12090015
Add 2 µL, Molecular Instruments COVID Probe Set to the RNA suspension Molecular Instruments HCR COVID Probe Set Molecular Instruments
Place Molecular Instruments Alexa Flour 488 B1 HCR Amplifier in 90 °C for 00:02:00
Remove Molecular Instruments Alexa Flour 488 B1 HCR Amplifiers and place at Room temperature for 00:30:00
Add 2 µL of each Molecular Instruments Alexa Flour 488 B1 HCR Amplifier H1 and H2 to the RNA suspension
Dilute 100 µL of 20x SSC Buffer to 5x SSC Buffer SSC Buffer, 20X, 1L Promega Catalog #V4261
Add 4 µL of 5x SSC Buffer to the RNA Suspension
Remove sample from incubation and pipette 1 µL onto a glass slide with a coverslip
Image slide under a fluorescent microscope with filter cubes for FITC or Alexa Flour 488
creator: Devin Willis
